regex.title: Positive tabIndex breaks natural tab order
regex.description: A positive tabIndex forces a manual tab order that fights the DOM order and traps keyboard users (ANTI-SLOP UX §11).
regex.resolution: Use tabIndex={0} (focusable, natural order) or tabIndex={-1} (programmatic focus only); fix DOM order instead.

regex.title: missing loading attribute
regex.description: Images without an explicit loading attribute leave loading behavior implicit and often ship eagerly by accident.
regex.resolution: Set loading="lazy" for non-critical images or loading="eager" for above-the-fold exceptions.

regex.title: Emoji used as UI icon / bullet
regex.description: Emoji as a section marker, bullet, or icon — generic AI-slop tell (ANTI-SLOP UX §0).
regex.resolution: Use a real icon component or text label; reserve emoji for user content.

regex.title: "Trusted by" logo-strip cliché
regex.description: Generic "Trusted by" social-proof strip under the hero — AI landing-page cliché (ANTI-SLOP UX §0).
regex.resolution: Show concrete, specific proof (a real case study, metric, or quote) or drop it.

regex.title: Lorem ipsum placeholder copy
regex.description: Generic Lorem ipsum in a functional draft — never tests real text wrapping (ANTI-SLOP UX §6).

regex.title: Robotic / generic microcopy
regex.description: Robotic placeholder microcopy instead of human, contextual labels (ANTI-SLOP UX §6).
regex.resolution: Write what the action does: "Save changes", "Send invite" — not "Submit Data".

regex.title: Heavy floating drop-shadow card
regex.description: Floating card with a heavy drop shadow — generic AI-slop aesthetic (ANTI-SLOP UX §0).
regex.resolution: Use a subtle elevation token or a hairline border for separation.

regex.title: Linear easing on UI motion
regex.description: Linear easing reads as robotic — UI motion should use spring/bezier curves (ANTI-SLOP UX §26).
regex.resolution: Use ease-out / a custom cubic-bezier / spring physics; keep motion 200–300ms.

regex.title: UI motion longer than ~300ms
regex.description: Transition/animation longer than ~300ms feels sluggish — UI motion should be 200–300ms (ANTI-SLOP UX §26).
regex.resolution: Use duration-150…duration-300; reserve long durations for decorative, non-blocking motion.

regex.title: Array index used as React key
regex.description: Array index as a key breaks reconciliation on reorder/insert/delete — stale or wrong DOM state (ANTI-SLOP UX §1/§13 adjacent).
regex.resolution: Use a stable unique id from the item (key={item.id}).

regex.title: View state in useState instead of the URL
regex.description: Tab/page/filter/sort kept in component state is lost on refresh and not deep-linkable — should sync to URL query params (ANTI-SLOP UX §14).
regex.resolution: Drive the view modifier from the URL (useSearchParams / router query): ?tab=billing&page=2.
